title: Anomaly
description: A deviation from expected behavior: supernatural phenomena, environmental shifts, or unexplained patterns.

related_entities.description: Entity IDs linked to or affected by this anomaly.

description.description: Factual description of the observed anomaly.

first_seen_turn.description: Turn ID when the anomaly was first observed.

last_updated_turn.description: Turn ID of the most recent observation or update.

observation_turns.description: All turn IDs where this anomaly was observed or referenced.

notes.description: Optional notes, hypotheses, or open questions about this anomaly.
